기존: \\| *(bash|sh)( |\$)

# ---- timing fn: bench <label> <hook-abs> <stdin> ----
bench() {
  local label="$1" hook="$2" stdin="$3"
  [ -f "$hook" ] || { printf '  %-42s MISSING\n' "$label"; return; }
  local samples; samples=$(mktemp)
  local i t0 t1

  p95=$(sort -n "$samples" | sed -n '19p')
  mx=$(sort -n "$samples" | tail -1)
  printf '  %-42s p50=%4sms  p95=%4sms  max=%4sms\n' "$label" "$p50" "$p95" "$mx"
  rm -f "$samples"
